headline: The Two Divergent Futures Priced Into Caterpillar Stock
summary: The market is pricing a substantial degree of uncertainty into the industrial giant's future, exposing shareholders to significant valuation risk.

headline: Cummins Announces Phased Model Year 2027 Product Launch Plan
summary: COLUMBUS, Ind., July 23, 2026--Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI) today announced updates to its Model Year 2027 North American on-highway product launch plans following its review of the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency’s recently proposed changes to upcoming emissions regulations.

headline: Dividend Announcements: July 11-17, 2026
summary: CMI stands out with an Excellent quality score and a 10% dividend hike but trades at a 19% premium to fair value. Check out last week's dividend announcements here.
